summary: Completed testing of Wedding Day Mode features (iteration 5). All 19 backend tests passed (100%). All new Wedding Day Mode endpoints working correctly. Frontend features verified for Discover page (live stats bar, bouquet toss section, used state handling). Admin dashboard correctly shows payment screen for hosts without events.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/events/wedding-day-mode - returns is_wedding_day=false, event_name='Emma & James', wedding_date='2026-06-15'
Backend: GET /api/events/live-stats - returns total_guests=3, total_matches=3, today_matches=3, recent_match_names list
Backend: POST /api/bouquet-toss (alice) - returns 400 'already used' as expected
Backend: POST /api/bouquet-toss (marcus first use) - PASSED (created match successfully)
Backend: POST /api/bouquet-toss (marcus second use) - returns 400 'already used' (one-time enforcement)
Backend: All 14 previous API tests still passing
Frontend: Discover page shows live stats bar with '3 guests | 3 matches | 3 today'
Frontend: Discover page shows Bouquet Toss section with 'Toss the Bouquet' button
Frontend: Alice clicks Bouquet Toss - error toast 'You've already used your bouquet toss!' appears
Frontend: After error, UI updates to show 'You've used your bouquet toss!' message
Frontend: Wedding Day Banner NOT visible (correct since today is not 2026-06-15)
Frontend: Admin dashboard for testhost@demo.com shows payment screen (no event yet)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Wedding Day Mode features tested and working: (1) wedding-day-mode endpoint returns false since today != 2026-06-15, (2) live-stats endpoint shows 3 guests, 3 matches with recent_match_names, (3) bouquet-toss enforces one-time use correctly - alice and marcus have both used theirs, (4) UI shows live stats bar and bouquet toss section on Discover page, (5) confetti animation is coded but only triggers when isWeddingDay=true. Admin live stats only shows for hosts WITH events - testhost doesn't have one yet.

notes.wedding_day_feature: Wedding Day Mode auto-activates when today's date matches the event's wedding_date (2026-06-15). Currently returns false.
notes.bouquet_toss_state: alice and marcus have both used their one-time bouquet toss. sophie hasn't used hers but has no eligible matches available (returns 404).
notes.admin_live_stats: Admin live stats only appear after host creates an event. testhost@demo.com hasn't paid/created event yet.
notes.confetti: Confetti animation component is implemented in DiscoverPage but only triggers when isWeddingDay=true
